title: All in one ultimate (AIOU)
body:
![Addoners ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5602237a8f63c337304dbf76d0d64a7b68cba896.png)
# **THE AIOU (ALL IN ONE ULTIMATE)**

## **The Description**

Ever since 2023, AIOU's goal has been simple: Provide better items, weapons and some models textures, while still preserving the vanilla look and feel. It is created by [Mcbugs-Addon](https://www.youtube.com/@Mcbugs_Addon), AIOU is completely free and open-source for everybody to enjoy on Minecraft Java or Bedrock.

Although AIOU can also be used as a Minecraft PvP texture pack. cuz it has better looking items , swords , wepons ,tools etc. It also has side shield for pvp. It also has a custom font , full grass and the dark mode for every menu. If you want to see how it looks so pls check out the gallery section.

# **[JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER HERE](https://discord.com/invite/DzxWdQHfV2)**
